description_long: This community center is a two-story brick building with a steeply pitched, gray shingle roof and a prominent front entrance featuring double doors beneath a small awning. The facade includes arched windows and decorative stonework, while the sides and rear are simpler, with rectangular windows and minimal ornamentation. The building is set on a large paved lot, with a dedicated parking area marked by white lines and bordered by a low brick wall. A set of steps leads up to the main entrance, flanked by green landscaping patches. The structure appears solid and institutional, with a blend of traditional and functional design elements. The overall layout suggests accessibility and community use, with clear separation between pedestrian and vehicular areas.
description: A two-story brick community center with a pitched gray roof, arched windows, and a large adjacent parking lot. The main entrance features steps, landscaping, and decorative stonework.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, arched windows, steps, and landscaping, as well as the adjacent parking lot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, multiple rectangular windows, and the full extent of the parking lot with marked spaces.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back entrance with steps, the side of the building, and the parking lot bordered by a brick wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain wall with several windows and the continuation of the paved area.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is located at the front, featuring a set of double doors beneath a small awning, accessed by a short flight of steps. The entrance is flanked by two green landscaping patches and is integrated with decorative stonework and arched windows, providing a welcoming and formal appearance. No ramps or automatic doors are visible.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a blend of traditional and institutional architectural styles, characterized by red brick construction, a steeply pitched gray shingle roof, arched windows on the front facade, and minimal ornamentation on the sides and rear.
